---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17)
- **OS:** (e.g. macOS, iOS, Windows)
- **Layout:** (web / mobile / both)
- **Language setting:** (e.g. English, 中文)
- **API keys configured:** (Groq / Gemini / neither)

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
